name: Toenec Corporation
summary: Toenec Corporation, an integrated facility company, engages in the construction and improvement of social infrastructure in the energy, environment, and information technology fields in Japan. The company constructs electricity distribution routes; underground power lines; indoor electrical equipment that supports building functions and factory production systems; and broadband networks, such as transmission equipment, telecommunication related, FTTH, and infrastructure construction, as well as provides information and telecommunication equipment construction services. It also deploys infrastructure for mobile telecommunications equipment comprising the construction of mobile telephone base stations; constructs air conditioning and ground water usage systems; designs, constructs, and maintains sanitary equipment and water treatment facilities, and energy projects for public services; and supplies water for buildings and factories, and heat for building air conditioning. In addition, the company engages in the fire-control system construction; scaffolding, earthworks, concrete, painting, waterproofing, and interior finishing works; and procurement, manufacture, sale, and leasing of control equipment, lighting equipment, wiring materials, electrical appliances, furniture, kitchen equipment, medical equipment, health and hygiene equipment, home-care devices and goods, fitness equipment, sporting goods, apparel, sundry items, building plant and equipment, air-conditioning equipment, compressors, electrical communication equipment, computer systems, data terminals, and related parts. Further, the company provides freight vehicles; sells, leases, and manages real estate; invests and finances in other companies; and dispatches manpower. The company was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan. Toenec Corporation is a subsidiary of Chubu Electric Power Company, Incorporated.
